introSection: Superman: La Atracción de Acero ("Superman: The Ride of Steel" in English) is a steel floorless coaster by Bolliger & Mabillard at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain.
fullText: Superman: La Atracción de Acero ("Superman: The Ride of Steel" in English) is a steel floorless coaster by Bolliger & Mabillard at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain.
